title: Official Crafting Dead:Modpack
description:
Welcome to the Official Crafting Dead Modpack!
Features & Experiences: What Crafting Dead Brings to Minecraft
Crafting Dead isn’t just another mod; it’s an entirely new survival experience set in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by the undead.
body:
**We Are now on Modrinth**

 Welcome to the Official Crafting Dead Modpack!


Features & Experiences: What Crafting Dead Brings to Minecraft
Crafting Dead isn’t just another mod; it’s an entirely new survival experience set in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by the undead. Our modpack transforms Minecraft into a thrilling, zombie-infested survival challenge, where every decision you make could be your last. Here’s what sets Crafting Dead apart:

 1. Immersive Apocalypse Setting
Step into a world where civilization has collapsed, and the dead walk the earth. Explore vast, meticulously crafted cities overrun by zombies, abandoned military bases filled with rare loot, and rural outposts where survivors cling to life. Every corner of this new world hides secrets, danger, and opportunities for survival.

Explore massive urban landscapes teeming with the undead.
Loot abandoned buildings for supplies, weapons, and food.
Encounter environmental storytelling through hidden notes, abandoned shelters, and eerie soundscapes.

2. Dynamic Zombie Survival Mechanics
Crafting Dead adds an entire new layer of survival mechanics. Beyond hunger and health, you’ll have to manage limited ammunition, scavenging for supplies, and surviving hordes of zombies that get faster and stronger at night. This isn’t just Minecraft with zombies; it’s an apocalypse simulator that will push your survival instincts to the limit.

Tactical weaponry: Use guns, melee weapons, and explosives to fend off the undead.
New combat system: Firearms with realistic recoil, reload mechanics, and tactical attachments.
Hordes of zombies: Survive waves of zombies that vary in speed, aggression, and strength.
3. Team Up or Go It Alone
In Crafting Dead, you can choose how to survive. Join forces with other players on our multiplayer servers and form alliances, or brave the apocalypse alone and trust no one. On our public servers, players often form factions, scavenge for supplies together, and build bases to defend against both zombies and rival survivors.

Multiplayer Factions: Join player-led factions and conquer the wasteland.
Base Building: Construct fortified safe zones to protect your supplies and team.
PvP & PvE: Battle it out with other players or work together to fight off the undead hordes.
4. Custom Weapons, Loot, and Crafting Systems
We’ve overhauled Minecraft’s inventory and crafting system to better reflect the needs of a zombie apocalypse. Craft custom weapons, ammunition, and medical supplies from salvaged materials found across the map.

New crafting recipes for survival essentials like bandages, antidotes, and food.
Craft and modify firearms with attachments like scopes, silencers, and grips.
Loot crates found throughout the world contain rare and powerful items, but beware of what may be lurking nearby.
5. Expansive Multiplayer Network
Join our official Crafting Dead server network, a global community of players surviving together (or against each other). With over 10,000 active members in our Discord, the action never stops. Participate in events, giveaways, and roleplaying scenarios inspired by classic zombie survival stories like "The Walking Dead."

Regular updates and new content ensure fresh experiences and challenges.
Community-driven gameplay with frequent events, including zombie horde survival and faction wars.
6. A Rich, Roleplay-Driven Experience
Many players use Crafting Dead to create their own survival stories. Whether you're reenacting famous scenes from your favorite zombie TV show or developing your own apocalypse saga, the mod encourages creativity and roleplay.

Custom skins and roleplaying mechanics allow you to bring characters to life.
Story-driven events that challenge your survival skills in new and unique ways.
Media & Showcase:
Check out our gameplay video here for a first-hand look at what Crafting Dead has to offer!

Ready to Survive?
The world of Crafting Dead is unforgiving, but for those who are willing to fight, the rewards are endless. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, the unique blend of survival, combat, and exploration will keep you coming back for more. Download now and start your adventure!
_

Download the modpack
Requirements:
Technical Specifications:
OS: Windows XP / Vista / 7 / 8 / 10
Processor: Intel i3-7100 or better
Graphics: 2GB NVIDIA GeForce or 2GB AMD Radeon
Memory: 2 GB DDR3 RAM


64-bit processor and operating system required
Start your journey into the world of Crafting Dead now! For a complete zombie apocalypse experience, join our servers, meet fellow survivors, and stay tuned for more updates.
